== [[Lottery_Machine#Weekly_Lottery_Event|Lottery Week]] ==
=== 2023 ===
{|class= "wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
!Week
!Giga Ball<br>400 Lottery Points
!Organ Stage 2
!Balloon Battle Relics
!Relic Rapture<br>Lotto Machine No. 1
!Relic Rapture<br>Lotto Machine No. 2
!Limited Bargain Relics
!Giga Ball / RNG Skill ???
|-
|Jul. 21 - Jul. 27 2023
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ansidei Madonna|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Mutated Tentacle|purple}}

|N/A

!Week

!Organ Stage 2
!Balloon Battle Relics

|-

|Mar. 14 - Mar. 20 2025
|Stage 3: {{RewardIconWithLink|S Relic Choice Pack I|orange}}<br>Stage 4: {{RewardIconWithLink|Offering SS Choice Pack II|orange}}<br>Stage 5A: {{RewardIconWithLink|Nightingale Medal|orange}}<br>Stage 5B: {{RewardIconWithLink|Relativity Scripts|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Das Kapital|orange}}
|}
